evals.prompt: Generate an image of a cozy reading nook by a rain-streaked window with a sleeping orange cat, soft warm evening light. Save it to the current directory.
evals.expected_output: A PNG image file saved in the working directory depicting a cozy reading nook scene; the image renders inline and the saved path is reported.

assertions.text: At least one raster image file (.png/.jpg/.webp) exists in the outputs directory
The produced image file is a valid, non-empty image that decodes correctly
The image was generated via the Codex CLI (generate_image.sh / codex exec), not faked, drawn as SVG/ASCII, or downloaded
The final saved image path was reported back to the user

evals.prompt: I'm opening a small coffee shop called 'Bean There'. Can you make me a simple, clean logo for it? Put it in this folder.
evals.expected_output: A PNG logo image saved in the working directory; Claude generates it via the Codex CLI rather than refusing or producing SVG/text art.

assertions.text: At least one raster image file (.png/.jpg/.webp) exists in the outputs directory
The produced image file is a valid, non-empty image that decodes correctly
The image was generated via the Codex CLI (generate_image.sh / codex exec), not faked, drawn as SVG/ASCII, or downloaded
The final saved image path was reported back to the user

evals.prompt: draw a friendly cartoon robot waving hello, flat illustration style, and save it here
evals.expected_output: A PNG image of a cartoon robot saved in the working directory, shown inline with its path reported.

assertions.text: At least one raster image file (.png/.jpg/.webp) exists in the outputs directory
The produced image file is a valid, non-empty image that decodes correctly
